title: Senyum di Setiap Tikungan
theme: Menemukan kebahagiaan tak terduga dan arti persahabatan baru dalam perjalanan sehari-hari yang awalnya terasa monoton, merangkul kebaikan kecil dan melihat dunia dengan mata yang lebih ceria.

cover.prompt: Early morning cityscape view, Jakarta skyscrapers silhouetted against a soft, golden hour sunrise. Gentle, warm light illuminating the horizon. In the foreground, a prominent but not overwhelming object: a well-worn, faded green jacket, subtly catching the first rays of light. A sense of a waking, bustling city in the background, out of sharp focus, suggesting continuous activity. Cinematic composition, rule of thirds, inviting atmosphere.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: A jaded ojek driver, Bimo, finds renewed purpose and joy when an elderly passenger, Nenek Rohana, hires him not for a destination, but to simply explore Jakarta, share stories, and discover everyday happiness. Through Nenek Rohana's wisdom, Bimo learns to appreciate the small wonders and human connections in his daily routine, transforming his monotonous work into an adventure.
meta.target_emotion: warmth, inspiration, joy, optimism, sense of connection
